race.comment: TORRITA (15) is a lightly raced mare who was a dominant maiden winner before a break. Returned with an eye-catching run, getting back to last from the wide gate before charging home when the race was over. Looks well placed here with the run under the belt and can measure up. SWYCHO (12) was safely held over a mile on the main track last time but saves best for this circuit, with a win and three minors from four tries. Beaten a head here two back and gets chance to atone. ANNIHILATE (4) was placed in a BM70 two back then seventh but only two lengths away here last time. Rarely far away and is one of the leading chances. BOLD SECRET (8) was off the mark with a big maiden win over the border at Geelong. This tougher and wide gate to overcome but has good upside and expected to measure up. ATTAIN (1) is going better than form suggests and is worth including.
